samples.xml_description: Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing. Clock. Active-low reset. Input enable. Multiplicand. Multiplier. Output enable. Product. 8 Reset the internal states. always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) begin mul_en_out_reg <= 0; mul_a_reg <= 0; mul_b_reg <= 0; end end Update the internal states from the input ports. always @(posedge clk) begin mul_en_out_reg[N-1:0] <= mul_en_in; mul_a_reg[N-1:0] <= mul_a; mul_b_reg[N-1:0] <= mul_b; end Generate the partial products. genvar i; generate for (i = 0; i < N; i = i + 1) begin : gen_partial_products assign temp[i][N-1:0] = mul_a_reg & {N{mul_b_reg[i]}}; end endgenerate Calculate the partial sums. genvar j; generate for (j = 0; j < N; j = j + 1) begin : gen_partial_sums if (j == 0) begin assign sum[j][N-1:0] = temp[j][N-1:0]; end else begin assign sum[j][N-1:0] = temp[j][N-1:0] + sum[j-1][N-1:0]; end end endgenerate Calculate the final product. always @(posedge clk) begin mul_out_reg[N-1:0] <= sum[N-1][N-1:0]; end Assign the output port. assign mul_en_out = mul_en_out_reg[N-1]; assign mul_out = mul_en_out_reg[N-1] ? mul_out_reg[N-1:0] : 0;
